title: Thai Vegan Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan curry made with a rich and creamy sauce, served with steamed vegetables. This dish is a delicious and satisfying option for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the soy sauce, sugar, and lime juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry over brown rice and garnish with fresh Thai basil.
